mapper.select: SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_AIS_NO AS commAisNo, C.COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL AS commMainImgUrl, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_CONTENT AS commContent, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_UP_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commUpDate, C.COMM_USE_YN AS commUseYn FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_CAT_CD = #{catCd} ORDER BY C.COMM_NO DESC

SELECT C.COMM_NO AS commNo, C.COMM_MBR_ID AS commMbrId, M.MBR_NICKNAME AS mbrNickname, C.COMM_CAT_CD AS commCatCd, C.COMM_AIS_NO AS commAisNo, C.COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL AS commMainImgUrl, C.COMM_TITLE AS commTitle, C.COMM_CONTENT AS commContent, C.COMM_INQIRE_CNT AS commInqireCnt, C.COMM_LIKE_CNT AS commLikeCnt, C.COMM_CMNT_CNT AS commCmntCnt, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commRegDate, DATE_FORMAT(C.COMM_UP_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS commUpDate, C.COMM_USE_YN AS commUseYn, GROUP_CONCAT(H.HTAG_TAG_NAME) AS hashtagText FROM COMMUNITY C JOIN MEMBER M ON C.COMM_MBR_ID = M.MBR_ID LEFT JOIN COMMUNITY_HASHTAG CH ON C.COMM_NO = CH.CHTG_COMM_NO LEFT JOIN HASHTAG H ON CH.CHTG_HTAG_NO = H.HTAG_NO WHERE C.COMM_USE_YN = 'Y' AND C.COMM_NO = #{commNo} GROUP BY C.COMM_NO
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COMMUNITY ( COMM_MBR_ID, COMM_CAT_CD, COMM_TITLE, COMM_CONTENT, COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL ) VALUES ( #{commMbrId}, #{commCatCd}, #{commTitle}, #{commContent}, #{commMainImgUrl} )
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMUNITY SET COMM_TITLE = #{commTitle}, COMM_CONTENT = #{commContent}, COMM_MAIN_IMG_URL = #{commMainImgUrl}, COMM_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE COMM_NO = #{commNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HASHTAG ( HTAG_TAG_NAME, HTAG_USE_CNT ) VALUES ( #{tagName}, 0 )
